defaults.text: Use Highlight to call attention to important words in a sentence.

props.text: Use Highlight to call attention to important words in a sentence.
Search results can highlight owner, address, and status matches at the same time.
The highlight kit can match a complete phrase inside longer text.
Highlight repeats highlight matches wherever highlight appears.
This sentence renders without any highlighted text.

default.message: Highlight uses the text prop as the source string and highlightedText as the list of search terms.

multiple_words.message: Pass multiple strings in highlightedText to mark more than one term.

phrase_match.message: A highlightedText entry can be a full phrase, not only a single word.

no_match.message: When no highlightedText entry matches, Highlight renders the original text without a mark.
